case_title: SF DESIGN CENTER INVESTORS, LLC A DELAWARE VS. NATIONAL UPHOLSTERING COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA, ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF DESIGN CENTER INVESTORS, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL UPHOLSTERING COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 101 HENRY ADAMS STREET, SHOWROOM NO. 303, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
